categories.name: House
categories.description: Costs of keeping a roof over your head — housing payments and home services.

categories.name: Internet
categories.description: Home internet service and mobile phone bills.

categories.name: Rent
categories.description: Recurring monthly payment for the home itself.

categories.name: Mortgage
categories.description: Bank or lender mortgage payment for the primary residence.

categories.name: Strata Fee
categories.description: Condo, HOA, or strata fees for shared building maintenance.

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: Electricity, gas, water, and other recurring home utilities.

categories.name: Living
categories.description: Day-to-day spending — transport, food, and everyday personal expenses.

categories.name: Fun
categories.description: Entertainment, streaming subscriptions, dining out, hobbies, going out.

categories.name: Gas
categories.description: Fuel for personal vehicles (gas stations, EV charging).

categories.name: Grocery
categories.description: Supermarket and grocery-store food shopping for the household.

categories.name: Shopping
categories.description: Discretionary retail purchases — clothes, electronics, household goods.

categories.name: Savings
categories.description: Money set aside for the future — investments and earmarked savings.

categories.name: Emergency Fund
categories.description: Transfers into a rainy-day savings account.

categories.name: Retirement
categories.description: Retirement contributions — 401k, IRA, RRSP, brokerage auto-invest.

categories.name: Travel
categories.description: Money set aside for upcoming trips and vacations.

categories.name: Unknown
categories.description: Catch-all for transactions that have not been categorised yet.

metrics.label: Spend over time
metrics.description: Total spend bucketed across the dashboard's time range. Pick a rollup period to control granularity.

params_schema.name: rollup_period
params_schema.label: Rollup period
params_schema.description: How wide each point on the chart is.

params_schema.name: category_path
params_schema.label: Category filter
params_schema.description: Optional — restrict to one category and its subcategories.

metrics.label: Spend by category
metrics.description: Breakdown of spend by category over the dashboard's time range. Drill into a parent category to see its children.

params_schema.name: parent_category
params_schema.label: Drill into
params_schema.description: Optional — leave blank to see the top-level breakdown.

metrics.label: Top merchants
metrics.description: Highest-spend merchants in the dashboard's time range. A per-merchant breakdown — render it as a pie/treemap (proportion), bar (ranked), or table. Optionally filter to one category.

metrics.label: Total spend
metrics.description: Single grand total for the dashboard's time range. Optionally compare to the equivalent prior window.

params_schema.name: compare_to_previous
params_schema.label: Compare to previous period
params_schema.description: Show a delta versus the same-length window immediately before.

metrics.label: Average per period
metrics.description: Mean spend per rollup period across the dashboard's time range.

params_schema.name: rollup_period
params_schema.label: Rollup period
params_schema.description: Average is taken across periods of this size.

metrics.label: Transaction count
metrics.description: Number of transactions in the dashboard's time range.

metrics.label: Period comparison
metrics.description: Compare the dashboard's time range against a baseline window (previous period or prior year).

metrics.label: Spend forecast
metrics.description: Trailing-average or linear forecast over a horizon of months. Uses a fixed 12-month history ending today — independent of the dashboard's time range.

params_schema.name: horizon_months
params_schema.label: Horizon (months)
params_schema.description: How far into the future to project.

params_schema.name: method
params_schema.label: Method
params_schema.description: Trailing-average uses the last 6 months' mean; linear fits a line over the last 12.

metrics.label: Recent transactions
metrics.description: Most recent transactions in the dashboard's time range, newest first.
